task:
Build this app in Clear:

**CRM-to-Email Sync** (Level 7)

ARCHETYPE: data_sync. Shape: backend-only (no pages, no auth), CRON schedule (every 1 hour), FETCH from an external HTTPS URL, transform each record, SAVE to a destination table. This is distinct from batch_job (no external fetch) and from etl_pipeline (data_sync implies source→destination with 2+ external systems or an obvious source-of-truth relationship — here 'CRM users' → 'mailing list'). DO NOT build a dashboard. DO NOT add auth. D
final_source:
build for javascript backend

create a MailingList table:
  name, required
  email, required
  tag, default 'imported'
  synced_at_date, auto

every 1 hour:
  all_users = fetch from 'https://jsonplaceholder.typicode.com/users'
  for each user in all_users:
    save { name: user's name, email: user's email } to MailingList

when user calls GET /api/mailing-list:
  mailing_list = get all MailingList
  send back mailing_list
